Python Timer Decorator
content:
import functools
import time

def timer(func):
    @functools.wraps(func)
    def wrapper_timer(*args, **kwargs):
        start_time = time.perf_counter()
        value = func(*args, **kwargs)
        end_time = time.perf_counter()
        run_time = end_time - start_time
        print(f"Finished {func.__name__} in {run_time:.4f} secs")
        return value
    return wrapper_timer

title: Python Flatten Nested List
content:
def flatten_list(nested_list):
    return [item for sublist in nested_list for item in sublist]

# Example usage:
# matrix = [[1, 2, 3], [4, 5], [6, 7, 8, 9]]
# print(flatten_list(matrix))

content:
INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, last_login)
VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'alice@example.com', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    email = EXCLUDED.email,
    last_login = EXCLUDED.last_login;

title: PostgreSQL Recursive CTE
content:
WITH RECURSIVE employee_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT id, name, manager_id, 1 AS depth
    FROM employees
    WHERE manager_id IS NULL
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT e.id, e.name, e.manager_id, ep.depth + 1
    FROM employees e
    JOIN employee_hierarchy ep ON e.manager_id = ep.id
)
SELECT * FROM employee_hierarchy 
ORDER BY depth;

PHP PDO Database Connection
content:
<?php
$host = '127.0.0.1';
$db   = 'test_db';
$user = 'root';
$pass = '';
$charset = 'utf8mb4';

$dsn = "mysql:host=$host;dbname=$db;charset=$charset";
$options = [
    PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE            => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
    PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
    PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES   => false,
];

try {
     $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $user, $pass, $options);
} catch (\PDOException $e) {
     throw new \PDOException($e->getMessage(), (int)$e->getCode());
}
?>

title: Ruby Convert Hash to Query String
content:
require 'uri'

def to_query_string(hash)
  URI.encode_www_form(hash)
end

# Usage:
# params = { q: 'ruby', page: 2 }
# puts to_query_string(params) 
# => "q=ruby&page=2"

title: C# LINQ GroupBy and Select
content:
var categoryStats = products
    .GroupBy(p => p.Category)
    .Select(g => new 
    {
        Category = g.Key,
        TotalValue = g.Sum(p => p.Price * p.Stock),
        AveragePrice = g.Average(p => p.Price),
        Count = g.Count()
    })
    .OrderByDescending(stat => stat.TotalValue)
    .ToList();

Python Concurrent API Requests
content:
import asyncio
import aiohttp

async def fetch(session, url):
    async with session.get(url) as response:
        return await response.json()

async def fetch_all(urls):
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
        tasks = [fetch(session, url) for url in urls]
        return await asyncio.gather(*tasks)

# Usage:
# urls = ["https://api.example.com/data1", "https://api.example.com/data2"]
# results = asyncio.run(fetch_all(urls))

title: Git Undo Last Commit (Keep Changes)
content:
# Soft reset moves HEAD back but keeps your files modified
git reset --soft HEAD~1

# Option 2: If you just want to add a forgotten file to the last commit
git add forgotten_file.js
git commit --amend --no-edit

title: Docker Compose PostgreSQL Setup
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    restart: always
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: myuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: mypassword
      POSTGRES_DB: mydatabase
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  pgdata:
